SEARCH
Package com.sap.ai.sdk.core.model

Class BckndobjectStoreSecretStatusMetadata

java.lang.Object
com.sap.ai.sdk.core.model.BckndobjectStoreSecretStatusMetadata
public class BckndobjectStoreSecretStatusMetadata extends Object
Key value pairs of meta-data assigned to the secret when the secret was being created.
